title: You've stuck with us this far — tell the Dev Nekos what you think
intro: One minute to help us do better. Everything is optional, and you can skip anytime.

questions.label: If the team could only focus on polishing one feature next, which would you most want it to be?
If we had to pause updates on one feature to save effort, which would you miss the least?
Anything else you'd like to tell us? Gripes or wishes welcome.
questions.placeholder: e.g. what's made you want to close it lately, a feature you'd most like improved, or just something you'd say to the dev kittens… (optional)
questions.placeholder_template: Which direction would you most like "{label}" to go? Other thoughts are welcome too. (optional)
